title: selaginella sarmentosa
intro: Selaginella sarmentosa, also known as Spiked Spike Moss or Tonga moss, is a type of fern-like plant native to tropical regions. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Selaginella sarmentosa is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
